title: TE Connectivity's (TEL) Q1 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal first-quarter results reflect benefits from solid momentum across transportation solutions.

title: TE Connectivity Ltd. (TEL) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE:TEL ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call January 25, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Sujal Shah - VP, IR Terrence R.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2% and 2.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in the Store for TE Connectivity's (TEL) Q1 Earnings?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal first-quarter results are expected to reflect solid momentum across the industrial, communication and transportation segments amid supply constraints.

title: TE Connectivity to report first quarter financial results on Jan. 25, 2023
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , Jan. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL) will report financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2023 before trading begins on Jan. 25, 2023.
